system.description:
All combat squads train in concentrating their fire and working as a team to achieve fire superiority over their foes. While this ability is in effect, the Kill-team does not suffer the normal –20 to hit when using the Suppressing Fire and Overwatch actions.

RankImprovement
3Calling for Fire Support becomes a Free Action
system.effect: Kill-team ignores –20 penalty for Suppressing Fire and Overwatch

improvements.effect: Calling for Fire Support becomes a Free Action
